title: Allergen's TerraFirmaCraft (TFC)
description:
TerraFirmaCraft at its best
Create mod support, Firmalife, and amazing shaders!
body:
**Allergen's TerraFirmaCraft** is a simple Minecraft modpack.

It's basically TFC with great graphics, and some fun addons!
This modpack also has a good amount of performance mods to make it *hopefully* run better
